title: Dark Mode Styling for jQuery DataTable Editor Popup
story: As a DataTools Pro user in dark mode, I want the DataTable inline editor popup to have proper dark mode styling, so that the editor is readable and visually consistent with the rest of the interface.
description:
The jQuery DataTable Editor popup (used for inline cell editing) does not properly adapt to dark mode. The popup appears with light-mode styling against the dark background, creating a jarring visual contrast.

## Fix
Apply dark mode CSS overrides to the DataTable Editor popup so it matches the application's dark theme.
acceptance_criteria: DataTable Editor popup displays with dark mode styling when dark mode is active
Popup text, background, and borders are consistent with the dark theme
Editor popup remains functional and readable
ux_changes: DataTable Editor popup now displays with proper dark mode colors — background, text, and borders adapted to the dark theme.
implementation_notes: CSS dark mode overrides applied to the jQuery DataTable Editor popup elements.
comment_summary: Developer shared before/after screenshots showing the popup properly styled in dark mode.
